introSection: Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Delphin Be Grand Resort in Muratpaşa, Antalya, Turkey.

sections.title: About
sections.content: The coaster opened with the hotel's Funfair in 2016. An unknown Chinese company manufactured it. While it shares the layout seen on similar Fruit Worm Roller Coasters manufactured by Jinma Rides and Beston Amusement Equipment, the train car is different than those used by the other two manufacturers.

sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Delphin Be Grand Resort in Muratpaşa, Antalya, Turkey.

The coaster opened with the hotel's Funfair in 2016. An unknown Chinese company manufactured it. While it shares the layout seen on similar Fruit Worm Roller Coasters manufactured by Jinma Rides and Beston Amusement Equipment, the train car is different than those used by the other two manufacturers.



Green track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
